text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thanks for waiting! I'm Smart Falcon! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
As you know, my goal's to become a top
Umadol—an Umamusume who races, dances, and
brings sparkly hope to everyone!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And I'm going to work hard every day to make
that happen! I can't wait to get up on that
dazzling stage and give everyone my best
performance! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
